overview: Crocodilian is a SubBoss-class Beast monster found in Ship Graveyard. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 800 HP, 27 physical damage, 100 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 999, MaxImpactEndurance 999. 6 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Ball Attack at 220% ratio (594 base damage).

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 6 melee attacks. Melee Attack1 (150%), Melee Attack1 Combo (150%), Melee Attack2 (180%), and more.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: High Impact Values (ImpactRes 999, Endurance 999)
strategies.description: ImpactResistance 999 and MaxImpactEndurance 999. This monster does not have a Staggered ability in its ability set.

strategies.title: Resists: Fire
strategies.description: Elemental resistances: Fire (+500). Positive reduction values reduce incoming damage of that type.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 300
strategies.description: Has 300 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Highest Damage: Ball Attack (220% ratio)
strategies.description: Ball Attack deals 594 damage at base (220% ratio). This is the most dangerous attack to avoid.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 50 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.stuck_description: Has stuck-detection failsafes in behavior tree.
